arts.ttl: Man United eye Matheus Cunha but must sell before being able to afford Wolves' asking price for 15-goal star
arts.sum: Manchester United are on a long list of Premier League clubs who are interested in signing 25-year-old Brazilian forward Matheus Cunha from Wolves this summer.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou Claims He's 'Narrowed Down' Spurs' Dressing Room 'Leak' Culprit
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has revealed that Tottenham are close to figuring out who the dressing room leak at the club is.

arts.ttl: Spurs keen to acquire Tel but likely to re-negotiate with Bayern
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is expected to depart the Allianz Arena in summer having impressed thus far on his loan spell at Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Wolves: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Premier League
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou planning changes ahead of pivotal Europa League quarter-final decider against Eintracht Frankfurt

arts.ttl: Tottenham open investigation into 'leak' as Ange Postecoglou hits out at Spurs mole
arts.sum: Tottenham forward Wilson Odobert was reported to be injured prior to Thursday's Europa League quarter-final first leg, only to end up being an unused substitute

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou believes there is a ‘leak’ inside Tottenham after news of fake Wilson Odobert injury emerges
arts.sum: In his pre-match press conference, ahead of Tottenham’s upcoming match against Wolves on Sunday, Ange Postecoglou revealed he believes there is a ‘leak’ at Spurs that is releasing team news…

arts.ttl: We've got a leak inside the club - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur boss Ange Postecoglou says "there is no doubt" someone inside the club is leaking team news.

arts.ttl: Wolves lineup vs. Tottenham: Predicted XI for Premier League clash as Matheus Cunha decision confirmed
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Wolverhampton Wanderers could line up for Sunday's Premier League showdown with Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. Wolves: Predicted XI for Premier League clash as Ange Postecoglou makes seven changes
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up for Sunday's Premier League showdown with Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Tottenham poach ex-Arsenal chief as Daniel Levy makes key appointment
arts.sum: Vinai Venkatesham has been appointed as Tottenham's new chief executive officer after leaving their rivals Arsenal last year. The 44-year-old was at the Emirates for 14 years and was held in high regard by figures at the club
